title: Mentions in Files
excerpt: Hi. In the Files column, I have added a new Doc (Meeting Note) to be used as an agenda. When I try to “@” my team members, it is not working. I get “Couldn’t find anything”. Can someone offer suggestions to remedy this? …

posts.author: Tamimd (Tami Bryan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi. In the Files column, I have added a new Doc (Meeting Note) to be used as an agenda. When I try to “@” my team members, it is not working. I get “Couldn’t find anything”. Can someone offer suggestions to remedy this? Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tami,

This might be to do with the doc type! If this is a private or shareable doc, only team members who have access to the doc (i.e. have been invited) will appear as team members to chose from.

Let me know if this helps!

posts.author: Tamimd (Tami Bryan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca. Thank you for the reply. My Doc menu is quite different. I do not seem to have a way to change the doc type.
